title: Seeds to GROW - Serge Huber
overview: ​What do you do when you are fired from your own company — a company you founded more than 20 years ago? A web pioneer and dot-com crash survivor, Serge Huber co-founded Jahia, a software platform that grew to 150 employees and €25 million in funding — until the day he was let go. ​Today, he is successfully steering two new ventures, with AI as his force multiplier. A story of resilience, reinvention, and knowing what you truly want.
